generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor coupled with gear transmission system for precise motion control. Control inputs configurable as position, speed, or acceleration with dual-encoder feedback system for backlash mitigation."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear transmission system integrated with permanent magnet synchronous motor to enable precise motion control with configurable actuation ranges."
]

instance GearTransmissionSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission system including cycloidal gear for precise motion control, coupled with motor encoder and secondary encoder for positional accuracy."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder directly coupled to motor shaft for high-precision angle measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder positioned at gearbox output or load side for high-precision output angle measurement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor for real-time monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implicit geometric representation of physical components using SysML or specialized CAD tools for structural definition."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler, CADIntegrationEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model defined using ADLs (ACME, AADL, MontiArc Automaton) or SysML Internal Block Diagrams for component-connector perspectives, including interfaces and interconnections."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ADLModelingEnabler, SysMLBehavioralEnabler
]

instance PhysicsBasedSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation model implemented in MathWorks Simulink or other simulation engines for dynamic system behavior and control system design."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, CoSimulationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data-driven friction model (white-box and black-box) derived from executable simulation models for predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, DataAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series position data from motor encoder capturing real-time angular position of the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregationEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series position data from secondary encoder capturing high-precision output angle at gearbox or load side."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregationEnabler, ClosedLoopControlEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series current data from motor current sensor for real-time monitoring of electrical input."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataAggregationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based modeling enabler for multi-layered system description (requirements, functional/logical architecture, product layer) using Internal Block Diagrams and state machines."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, VisualizationService
]

instance ADLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language (ACME, AADL, MontiArc) enabler for defining components, interfaces, interconnections, and composition."
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService, ComponentIntegrationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink or other simulation engines for detailed behavioral modeling, dynamic system simulation, and control system design."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, ControlSimulationService
]

instance DataAggregationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model-based enabler for contextual data trace collection, aggregation, and abstraction from physical system."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software module for real-time state estimation using dual-encoder feedback and sensor fusion algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:enables ClosedLoopControlService
]

instance ClosedLoopControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control loop implementation using simulation models and general-purpose programming for autonomous feedback to physical system."
    DTDFVocab:enables ClosedLoopControlService
]

instance DataAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data analytics framework for processing digital shadow data to derive insights and predictive models."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]

instance MQTTStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT-based streaming protocol for remote control interfaces and real-time data transmission between physical and digital systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteControlService
]

instance CADIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Integration framework for connecting SysML geometric models with specialized CAD tools for high-fidelity digital replicas."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance CoSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware for co-simulation between MBSE models (SysML, ADLs) and simulation engines (Simulink, ANSYS)."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlSimulationService
]

instance SysMLBehavioralEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML state machines (v1.7+) and MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling and dynamic system simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralModelingService
]

// C6: Services
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of physical system state (motor/gearbox friction, position, current) via automated one-way data flow from physical twin to digital representation."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Derivation of friction models and predictive analytics using executable simulation models and aggregated digital shadow data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionPredictionInsight, FailurePredictionInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard-based visualization of system states, data traces, and simulation results for intuitive stakeholder interpretation."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalVisualizationInsight
]

instance BehavioralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Definition and validation of behavioral models using ADLs and SysML for component-connector perspectives and state machines."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance ComponentIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of heterogeneous components (motor, gearbox, encoders) using ADLs and SysML for interconnection and composition."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemIntegrationInsight
]

instance ControlSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of control loops and dynamic behavior using co-simulation between MBSE models and simulation engines."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlValidationInsight
]

instance ClosedLoopControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time closed-loop control implementation using dual-encoder feedback for precise motion control."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAccuracyInsight
]

instance RemoteControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control interface via MQTT-streamed commands for configurable actuation (position, speed, acceleration)."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteOperationInsight
]

instance AnomalyDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies in sensor data and system behavior using data analytics and predictive models."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live measurements of physical system state including motor/gearbox friction, position, and current for real-time monitoring."
]

instance FrictionPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive friction models (white-box and black-box) derived from simulation and aggregated sensor data."
]

instance FailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for potential system failures based on aggregated digital shadow data and simulation models."
]

instance OperationalVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Intuitive dashboard visualization of system states, data traces, and simulation results for stakeholder interpretation."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results of behavioral models against real-time system behavior and simulation outputs."
]

instance SystemIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Verification of component interconnections and composition using ADLs and SysML for system integration."
]

instance ControlValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of control loops and dynamic behavior through co-simulation between MBSE models and simulation engines."
]

instance ControlAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of closed-loop control accuracy using dual-encoder feedback and real-time state estimation."
]

instance RemoteOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status and performance metrics of remote control operations via MQTT-streamed commands."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified anomalies in sensor data and system behavior for predictive maintenance and operational adjustments."
]

// C17: Actions (Automatic)
instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters (position, speed, acceleration) based on real-time state estimation and predictive models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TriggerPredictiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic triggering of predictive maintenance procedures based on anomaly detection and failure prediction insights."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateSimulationModelsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of simulation models with latest aggregated sensor data for continuous model refinement."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GenerateVisualizationDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of visualization dashboards with latest system states, data traces, and simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance RobotAxisDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment for a single robot axis at the base, including modular decomposition (motor, gearwheel, cycloidical gearbox)."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, CycloidalGearbox, GearTransmissionSystem,
                MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor,
                GeometricModel, BehavioralModel, PhysicsBasedSimulationModel, FrictionModel,
                MotorPositionData, SecondaryPositionData, MotorCurrentData
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The document does not provide a **system-wide orchestration or coordination** framework for Digital Twin constellations. It references **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** and **architecture description languages (ADLs)** (e.g., ACME, AADL, MontiArc, SysML IBDs) to model **component & connector perspectives**, including interfaces, interconnections, and composition. While it mentions **active components** (e.g., software systems interpreting incoming data from sensors), these are limited to the **single digital shadow** context and do not extend to **architecture patterns** (e.g., event-driven, service-oriented), **resource management**, or **hybrid orchestration** for a broader Digital Twin system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system incorporates **fidelity and validity considerations** through structured **validation and verification (V&V) methods**, though specific techniques are not detailed in the document. Key aspects include:
  - **Model fidelity requirements**: Ensured via **multi-layered abstraction** (e.g., RFLP methodology) and **tool integration** (e.g., SysML, Simulink) to align digital representations with physical system behavior.
  - **Uncertainty sources**: Implicitly addressed through **data aggregation and abstraction** in digital shadows, where contextual traces are refined for specific purposes, reducing noise but potentially introducing abstraction-induced errors.
  - **Error detection and correction**: Relies on **active DT components** (e.g., simulation tools like Simulink or ADLs with behavioral extensions) to process incoming data and identify discrepancies between digital and physical states. No explicit mechanisms (e.g., machine learning, statistical methods) are mentioned.
  - **Quality assurance processes**: Enforced via **heterogeneous stakeholder integration** (e.g., engineers, domain experts) and **cross-tool consistency checks** (e.g., SysML ↔ Simulink ↔ code). The **Digital Shadow Reference Model** (Fig. 1) implies a foundational layer for traceability but lacks explicit validation protocols."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The document describes **sensor data integration** via **MQTT** for streaming time-series data from a single robot axis (e.g., joint behavior). It does not address **horizontal integration with external systems** (e.g., ERP, MES, federated architectures) or **interoperability standards** beyond the use of **SysML for architecture modeling**, **Simulink for simulation**, and **C++/Java for code implementation**. The focus is on **internal modularity** (e.g., motor, gearwheel components) rather than cross-system or cross-Digital Twin integration. No explicit protocols (e.g., OPC UA) or service-oriented interfaces are mentioned for broader system integration."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The provided documents reference **safety-critical considerations** in the context of **physical safety cells** (e.g., for robotic systems like the MABI robotic arm [44]), which are designed to ensure human-machine interaction safety. Additionally, **MQTT (Message Queuing Telemetry Transport) [52]** is employed for real-time data streaming between physical assets and their digital twins, enabling low-latency communication critical for safety monitoring. However, no explicit details on **cybersecurity protocols** (e.g., OAuth 2.0, JWT), **access control mechanisms**, **encryption standards**, or **risk assessment frameworks** (e.g., IEC 62443) are documented. The **Asset Administration Shell (AAS) [46, 47, 50]** framework, referenced in the context of Industrie 4.0, implies standardized data encapsulation but does not specify privacy or ownership policies. **Fail-safe mechanisms** or **threat mitigation strategies** are not addressed in the provided literature."
]
